id="_Image1" width="704px" height="195px" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>    </defs></svg>

_Professional AV and media services._
# What I promise
Cost-effective, professionally delivered AV and media solutions drawing on over 10 years of experience in the gaming events and corporate conference sectors.
# What I do
* I can advise, consult, install, and operate most any **AV equipment**, including cameras, vision mixers, rundowns, and web streams.
* In cooperation with _[BeforeTree Limited](https://beforetree.com)_, we can provide a full production solution for your event, conference, project, or business.
	* We have a storied history helping corporate conferences run smoothly and efficiently, with access to extremely talented engineers, producers, photographers, and editors.
	* Voxpops, sizzle reels, professional photo and videography, and any other business requirements.
* I can build custom graphics and CG integrating seamlessly with other parts of your event, including lectern displays.
* I can help keep your event running smoothly with planning, operational needs (including being a runner where necessary!), setup and teardown, and much more.
# What I don't do
* Any work requiring a qualified electrician (e.g on the mains side)
	* I am a "competent person" for the purposes of portable appliance testing / repairs, but cannot legally work on fixed installations.
* Challenging hardware installations requiring safety equipment (for example, those at height)
# My background
A lifetime of tech experience and a background in software engineering (in Python, PHP, and Go, if you're curious), video arcade maintenance and operations, and much more. Please see [my CV](https://rxresu.me/duck./main) for a full flavour.

My media experience comes from over 10 years of being responsible for the AV solution at our local [LAN parties](https://thebiggame.org), and I've successfully gained a national reputation for adding that little extra flair of quality even when working with horrifyingly tight volunteer budgets!

## A note on availability and ability
Please note that as someone with hidden disabilities, as I have to be quite careful with my pacing, **the speed at which I can work in the buildup to an event is not guaranteed, including for urgent work.** This does not apply during the event itself.

If this affects how quickly I can complete your task at any time, there will be no additional payment required compared to what it would take me if I were to be "firing on all cylinders".

Please also note that I do have issues walking or standing for extended periods, and may occasionally make use of a stool or similar to reduce pain.

_Thank you for your understanding._ 🙇

# Pricing
My standard hourly rate is currently **£30 p/h plus incurred expenses**. I aim to be completely transparent about expected cost before starting any work.

Specific projects (such as building new CG solutions) will be quoted individually before work commences.

## Portable Appliance Testing
All items are thoroughly inspected to the latest standards and professionally tested with calibrated Metrel testing equipment. Reports can be generated in PDF format. Pass labelling is free but optional. Minor repairs are inclusive (things like fuses and plug rewires).

**Cables / extension leads count as a separate item if they can be detached from an appliance.**

| *Task*                                        | *Price* |
| --------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| Per Item (0-20 items)                         | £2      |
| Per Item (20-100 items)                       | £1.50   |
| Per Item (100+ items)                         | £1      |
| Charity / Non-Profit, Per Item (any quantity) | £1      |
